lt.gd: This bill supplements or reduces appropriations otherwise provided for the support and operation of state government for the fiscal year beginning July 1, 2025 and ending June 30, 2026 and appropriates funds for the support and operation of state government for the fiscal year beginning July 1, 2026 and ending June 30, 2027.
lt.hp: This bill:provides appropriations for the use and support of higher education agencies and institutions;provides appropriations for other purposes as described;provides an estimate of the total budgets for higher education institutions; andprovides intent language.
lt.moni: Money Appropriated in this Bill:This bill appropriates $44,508,000 in operating and capital budgets for fiscal year 2026, including:($261,300) from General Fund; and($7,444,000) from Income Tax Fund; and$52,213,300 from various sources as detailed in this bill.This bill appropriates $13,721,000 in restricted fund and account transfers for fiscal year 2026, all of which is from the various sources as detailed in this bill.This bill reflects $45,798,700 in higher education budget reporting for fiscal year 2026.This bill appropriates $3,082,927,300 in operating and capital budgets for fiscal year 2027, including:$485,504,300 from General Fund; and$1,289,593,900 from Income Tax Fund; and$1,307,829,100 from various sources as detailed in this bill.This bill appropriates $91,500,000 in restricted fund and account transfers for fiscal year 2027, all of which is from the Income Tax Fund.This bill reflects $12,952,223,200 in higher education budget reporting for fiscal year 2027.
lt.oc: Other Special Clauses:This bill provides a special effective date.

leg.enact: Be it enacted by the Legislature of the state of Utah:

sectionText.summary: The following sums of money are appropriated for the fiscal year beginning July 1, 2025, and ending June 30, 2026. These are additions to amounts previously appropriated for fiscal year 2026.

licat.summary: Under the terms and conditions of Title 63J, Chapter 1, Budgetary Procedures Act, the Legislature appropriates the following sums of money from the funds or accounts indicated for the use and support of the government of the state of Utah.

lineitem.name: Education and General
lineitem.lidesc: University of Utah - Education and General

licat.summary: The Legislature authorizes the State Division of Finance to transfer the following amounts between the following funds or accounts as indicated. Expenditures and outlays from the funds to which the money is transferred must be authorized by an appropriation.

lineitem.name: Income Tax Fund Restricted - Performance Funding Restricted Account
lineitem.lidesc: Income Tax Fund Restricted - Performance Funding Restricted Account

licat.summary: The Legislature has reviewed proposed revenues and expenditures for the following institutions of higher education. These figures are for reporting purposes only and include appropriations made to the operating and capital budgets of these institutions.

sectionText.summary: The following sums of money are appropriated for the fiscal year beginning July 1, 2026, and ending June 30, 2027. These are additions to amounts previously appropriated for fiscal year 2027.

licat.summary: Under the terms and conditions of Title 63J, Chapter 1, Budgetary Procedures Act, the Legislature appropriates the following sums of money from the funds or accounts indicated for the use and support of the government of the state of Utah.

lineitem.appintent: In accordance with UCA 63J-1-903, the Legislature intends that the University of Utah report on the following Special Projects line item performance measure for FY 2027: Number of Schools and School Children Participating in On-site Field Trips to Red Butte Garden (Target = 0%).

sectionText.summary: The following sums of money are appropriated for the fiscal year beginning July 1, 2026, and ending June 30, 2027. These are additions to amounts previously appropriated for fiscal year 2027.

licat.summary: Under the terms and conditions of Title 63J, Chapter 1, Budgetary Procedures Act, the Legislature appropriates the following sums of money from the funds or accounts indicated for the use and support of the government of the state of Utah.

lineitem.name: Education and General
lineitem.lidesc: University of Utah - Education and General

subsection.amend: Except as provided in Subsection (2), this bill takes effect July 1, 2026.
The actions affecting Section 1 (Effective upon governor's approval) take effect:
except as provided in Subsection (2)(b), May 6, 2026; or
if approved by two-thirds of all members elected to each house:
without the governor's signature, the day following the constitutional time limit of Utah Constitution, Article VII, Section 8; or
in the case of a veto, the date of veto override.
